character.name:
Dark corrupted sorcerer, isometric pixel art, gothic fantasy, 
standing upright facing camera 3/4 view. Tall dark purple robe 
widening toward ground, deep black hood hiding face with a single 
glowing violet eye visible. Holding a gnarled wooden staff in one 
hand topped with a pulsing purple arcane orb. Mystical glowing 
sigil rune on the chest of the robe. Slim silhouette, floaty feel. 
Colors: deep purple #1a0a2e robe, violet glow #9b6bff, black hood. 
Crisp pixel art, dark background, transparent if possible.
